title: Correcting Incorrect ASCII Art
scenario: Given a string containing a distorted ASCII art image of a cat, write a function in Python that correctly renders the image by re-arranging the characters. The function should be named 'correct_ascii_art' and should take the distorted image string as input. The output should be the corrected ASCII art image.
constraints: Must be under 40 lines of code
Must use a dictionary to store the character mapping

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code is syntactically correct and uses Python syntax.
Check if the code meets the constraints specified in the scenario.
Check if the code is readable and follows best practices.
Check if the code uses a dictionary to store the character mapping.
